payload.answer: The Brain architecture includes Brain DB as the source of truth, Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack as a strict memory intake agent. Open questions involve potentially adding Telegram later and identifying the cheapest model that saturates performance.
payload.intent: Extract key architectural components and open questions about the Brain system.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

details: Successfully extracted architectural components and open questions.
